# Samburu Elephant Lodge

> Authentic safari lodge on the banks of the Ewaso Nyiro River in Kenya's Samburu National Reserve. Wildlife, Samburu culture, and eco-friendly stays.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the lodge, wildlife and the Samburu experience.
- [Accommodation](/accommodation): Cottages, tents and rooms available at the lodge.
- [Experiences](/experiences): Game drives, cultural visits and bush activities.
- [Travel Info](/travel-info): How to reach Samburu by road or air, and what to pack.
- [Holiday Offers](/holiday-offers): Seasonal Easter, Valentine's and camping packages.
- [Community](/community): Conservation and community projects supported by the lodge.
- [Contact](/contact): Reservations and enquiries.
- [Reservation](/reservation): Book a stay at the lodge.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories from the wild, travel tips and conservation insights.

## Blog

- [Driving to Samburu Elephant Lodge](/blog/driving-to-samburu-elephant-lodge): What vehicle you really need for the drive.
- [Samburu Safari Dos and Donts](/blog/samburu-safari-dos-and-donts): Tips for an unforgettable safari.
- [Hidden History of Archers Post](/blog/hidden-history-archers-post): Culture and legends near the reserve.
- [Sustainable Safari](/blog/sustainable-safari-eco-tourism): Our eco-tourism commitment.
- [Best Time to Visit Samburu](/blog/best-time-to-visit-samburu): Seasons and wildlife viewing.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
